sections.reasoning: To tell a complete story about Portland unemployment trends, I selected the Portland Metro unemployment rate as the primary signal, Oregon's statewide rate for regional context, and the US national rate for macro comparison. Together these three metrics reveal whether Portland's labor market is tracking with broader trends or diverging—which is key for policy decisions around workforce development and economic intervention.

widgets.title: Portland Metro Unemployment Rate
widgets.description: Monthly unemployment rate for the Portland-Vancouver-Hillsboro metro, the most direct measure of local labor market health over time.

widgets.title: Oregon Unemployment Rate
widgets.description: Statewide unemployment rate providing regional context to assess whether Portland's trends mirror or diverge from Oregon as a whole.

widgets.title: US Unemployment Rate
widgets.description: National unemployment rate as a macro benchmark to identify whether Portland's labor challenges are local or part of broader national cycles.

widgets.title: Portland Metro Current Unemployment
widgets.description: Latest single-value snapshot of Portland Metro unemployment rate for at-a-glance policy reference.
